case_title: AMY KROGEN VS. ANDREA BEGA et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-20-2007, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STERLING, IAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KROGEN, AMY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEGA, ANDREA $450.00 PRINCIPAL, $72.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $522.00, THE COURT FINDS IN FAVOR OF THOMAS AND STERLING ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. NOTHING IN THIS JUDGMENT SHALL BE CONSTRUED TO AFFECT OR ALTER THE PARTIES SETTLEMENT ARRANGEMENTS WITH VILLA PARKMMERCED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
